instructions.information: Ear infection, identified by redness around the eardrum.
Antibiotic prescribed to help Rio feel better, sent to the pharmacy.

parameters.keywords: ear infection, otitis media, middle ear infection, tympanitis, ear inflammation
parameters.rationale: The diagnosis of an ear infection is supported by the observation of redness around the eardrum, which is a common sign of inflammation or infection in the ear.
parameters.assessment: The patient presents with an ear infection, as indicated by redness around the eardrum. Further evaluation and treatment are necessary to address the condition.

parameters.sig: Take as directed by the healthcare provider.
parameters.comment: Prescribed to help Rio feel better.
